name: Setup Workspace
description: Create git branches or worktrees for isolated parallel development.

function.name: setup_workspace
function.description:
Set up an isolated git workspace for development. Supports creating branches, worktrees, listing them, and cleaning up worktrees when done.

Use 'branch' to create and switch to a new branch in the current repo.
Use 'worktree' to create a separate working directory with its own branch (ideal for parallel agents).
Use 'list' to see existing branches and worktrees.
Use 'remove_worktree' to clean up a worktree after work is done.

action.description: Action to perform: 'branch' creates and checks out a new branch, 'worktree' creates a git worktree with a new branch in a sibling directory, 'list' shows branches and worktrees, 'remove_worktree' cleans up a worktree.

name.description: Branch name (for 'branch' and 'worktree' actions) or worktree path (for 'remove_worktree'). Example: 'feature/add-auth'

base.description: Base branch or ref to branch from. Defaults to the current branch if omitted.

mock_response: var args = ARGS; var r = {}; if (args.action === 'branch') { r = {result: 'success', action: 'branch', branch: args.name || 'feature/example', message: 'Created and switched to branch ' + (args.name || 'feature/example')}; } else if (args.action === 'worktree') { r = {result: 'success', action: 'worktree', branch: args.name || 'feature/example', path: '../worktrees/' + (args.name || 'feature/example').replace(/\//g, '-'), message: 'Worktree created'}; } else if (args.action === 'list') { r = {result: 'success', action: 'list', branches: ['main', 'feature/example'], worktrees: []}; } else if (args.action === 'remove_worktree') { r = {result: 'success', action: 'remove_worktree', message: 'Worktree removed'}; } else { r = {error: 'Unknown action: ' + args.action}; } console.log(JSON.stringify(r));
